en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Austria Trade License in the Austria Trade License Applicability Assessment.\t\n

The Austria Trade License is a statutory authorization required for most businesses to lawfully conduct commercial activities, including certain facility operations that may involve workplace safety, environmental protection, or facility condition requirements. The Austria Trade License can be obtained by submitting an application to district authority or online via the Austrian Trade Information System. Trade, Commerce, and Industry Regulation Act Federal Ministry of Labour and Economy
